greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Puff & Fluff Grooming. I'm the virtual receptionist. How can we pamper your pet today?

faq.a: Yes! Please call us at 602-266-5360 or visit our website to schedule.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: Most sessions take 1.5-2 hours depending on breed and coat condition.
We have a location in Phoenix, Arizona. Call us or visit our website for the exact address.
We primarily specialize in dog grooming. Please call to confirm if we can accommodate your cat.
Absolutely! Our experienced groomers work with all breeds and sizes with care and expertise.
We offer full grooms, bath & brush, nail trimming, ear cleaning, de-shedding, and specialty cuts.

escalation: Great question! Let me have a groomer get back to you. Call us at 602-266-5360.
